case_title: BERNARD TONG VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, BERNARD AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-18-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-25-2019

PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CLAUDIA W. BRISSON.
